tQTLExperiment 0.1.16
  • Get started
  • Reference

tQTLExperiment: a SummarizedExperiment for tensorQTL eQTL mapping

Source: R/tQTLExperiment-class.R
tQTLExperiment-class.Rd

tQTLExperiment extends SummarizedExperiment::RangedSummarizedExperiment to hold all data needed for the tensorQTL eQTL mapping tool:

Details

  • assays: phenotype matrix (features × samples)

  • rowRanges: genomic coordinates for each phenotype feature (gene)

  • colData: per-sample metadata including covariates

  • geno: lazy BEDMatrix::BEDMatrix over the PLINK .bed file (samples × variants); data are not loaded until subscripted

  • variantRanges: GenomicRanges::GRanges for each variant, with metadata columns snp_id, ref, alt

  • plinkPrefix: path prefix for the PLINK file set

tensorQTL is invoked via its CLI (python -m tensorqtl) and supports GPU acceleration through CUDA or Apple MPS (Metal Performance Shaders) on Apple Silicon.

Slots

geno

A BEDMatrix::BEDMatrix (samples × variants).

variantRanges

A GenomicRanges::GRanges of length equal to ncol(geno).

plinkPrefix

A length-one character string giving the PLINK file prefix.

See also

tQTLExperiment() for the constructor, prepareTQTL() to write input files and get the CLI command, readTQTL() to load results, findTQTL() to locate Python.

On this page
